directive8020ReleaseDate.title: Directive 8020 Release Date: May 12, 2026
directive8020ReleaseDate.intro: Directive 8020 launches on May 12, 2026 for PC via Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. This section covers the launch date, platform status, release timing, and day-one setup players need before boarding the Cassiopeia.

cards.label: Release Date
cards.description: Directive 8020 is scheduled to launch worldwide on May 12, 2026.

cards.label: Launch Time
cards.description: Store listings show Directive 8020 unlocking at 14:00 UTC on launch day.

cards.label: Platforms
cards.value: PC Steam, PS5, Xbox Series X|S
cards.description: Directive 8020 launches on Steam for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.

cards.label: Release Status
cards.description: Directive 8020 is available to pre-order or pre-purchase before launch.

cards.label: Game Type
cards.description: Directive 8020 blends story-driven horror, real-time alien danger, and branching choices.

cards.label: Story Setup
cards.description: Directive 8020 follows a deep-space mission where the crew faces a mimic organism.

notes: Directive 8020 is built around a new deep-space setting in The Dark Pictures Anthology.
Directive 8020 launch platforms focus on current-generation console and PC hardware.
Directive 8020 preorder pages highlight both standard purchase options and Digital Deluxe upgrade content.
Directive 8020 release planning should prioritize platform choice, co-op group size, and PC requirements.

Best fit for console players who want PS5 features, local play, and DualSense support.
Best fit for Xbox players who want local co-op, cloud saves, 4K Ultra HD support, and achievements.

directive8020SystemRequirements.title: Directive 8020 System Requirements for PC
directive8020SystemRequirements.intro: Directive 8020 requires a 64-bit Windows 10 or Windows 11 PC, 16 GB RAM, and a modern DirectX-capable GPU. Use this table to compare the minimum and recommended PC setup before pre-purchasing on Steam.

requirements.note: Directive 8020 requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
Directive 8020 recommended play favors a newer mid-range CPU class.
Directive 8020 lists 16 GB RAM for both minimum and recommended setups.

requirements.minimum: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 5700
requirements.recommended: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 6800
requirements.note: Directive 8020 PC planning should check GPU class first, then CPU and storage.
Directive 8020 benefits from SSD storage for smoother loading.

summary: Directive 8020 minimum PC planning starts around RTX 2060 or Radeon RX 5700 class graphics.
Directive 8020 recommended PC planning moves toward RTX 3070 Ti or Radeon RX 6800 class graphics.
Directive 8020 storage planning should keep at least 40 GB free before installation.

directive8020Gameplay.title: Directive 8020 Gameplay: Choices, Alien Threats, and Survival Horror
directive8020Gameplay.intro: Directive 8020 keeps the cinematic choice-driven DNA of The Dark Pictures Anthology while adding stronger real-time survival pressure. Players must survive alien threats, make deadly decisions, and manage trust inside the Cassiopeia crew.

features.title: Directive 8020 Story-Driven Survival
features.description: Directive 8020 combines interactive movie pacing with survival-focused decision making in a deep-space horror setting.

features.title: Directive 8020 Real-Time Danger
features.description: Directive 8020 adds direct pressure through dark corridors, stealth moments, quick reactions, and improvised survival choices.

features.title: Directive 8020 Trust No One
features.description: Directive 8020 turns crew suspicion into a gameplay problem because the organism can imitate its prey.

features.title: Directive 8020 Consequence Routes
features.description: Directive 8020 choices affect relationships, routes, character survival, and the outcome of critical scenes.

features.title: Directive 8020 Turning Points
features.description: Directive 8020 lets players revisit key decisions through a story tree built for alternate paths and character saves.

features.title: Directive 8020 Movie Night
features.description: Directive 8020 supports solo play and up to five-player couch co-op for groups sharing the horror story.

survivalNotes: Directive 8020 rewards careful reading of crew behavior because the mimic threat changes how trust works.
Directive 8020 survival depends on stealth, timing, and quick reactions as much as dialogue choices.
Directive 8020 replay value comes from branching routes, Turning Points, and alternate character outcomes.

directive8020Story.title: Directive 8020 Story: Cassiopeia, Tau Ceti f, and the Mimic Threat
directive8020Story.subtitle: Earth is dying, Tau Ceti f may be humanity's last hope, and the Cassiopeia crew must survive an alien organism that can perfectly imitate its prey.
directive8020Story.intro: Directive 8020 is a cinematic sci-fi survival horror story set aboard the colony ship Cassiopeia after a mission to Tau Ceti f goes catastrophically wrong. The crew must decide who to trust, how to survive, and whether saving themselves could endanger everyone back on Earth.

items.question: What is Directive 8020 about?
items.answer: Directive 8020 follows the crew of the colony ship Cassiopeia on a mission tied to humanity's survival. Earth is dying, and Tau Ceti f, located 12 light years from home, offers a small chance for a new future. After the Cassiopeia crash lands, the crew discovers they are not alone.

items.question: What is the Directive 8020 main horror threat?
items.answer: The core Directive 8020 threat is an alien organism capable of mimicking its prey. This turns the story into a paranoia-driven survival scenario where any crew member may be human, infected, or an impostor hiding in plain sight.

items.question: Why is Tau Ceti f important in Directive 8020?
items.answer: Tau Ceti f represents hope for humanity because Earth is running out of time. The Directive 8020 mission is connected to finding a potential future home, but the crash and alien threat transform that mission into a desperate fight for survival.

items.question: What role do Directive 8020 player choices play?
items.answer: Choices are central to Directive 8020. Players must make trust-based decisions, react to real-time threats, and shape which characters survive or die as the Cassiopeia crew faces alien infiltrators, deadly dilemmas, and catastrophic failures.

items.question: What is the biggest Directive 8020 story dilemma?
items.answer: The Directive 8020 crew is confronted with a brutal dilemma: to save themselves, they may have to risk the lives of everyone on Earth. This gives the story larger stakes beyond simple shipboard survival.

directive8020Characters.title: Directive 8020 Characters and Cast
directive8020Characters.subtitle: Meet the publicly revealed Directive 8020 Cassiopeia crew, including Brianna Young, the pilot played by Lashana Lynch.
directive8020Characters.intro: Directive 8020 centers on the Cassiopeia crew, whose personal histories, mission roles, and relationships become part of the horror once trust begins to collapse. The public character lineup includes pilots, mission leadership, science and medical specialists, engineers, sleep technicians, and Corinth's CEO.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Brianna Young
crew.description: Young is one of Corinth's rising stars and the pilot of the Cassiopeia. She is the daughter of the late astronaut Bill Young and sees the mission as a chance to prove herself to her father's legacy and to herself.
relationships: Close to the Young family legacy

crew.name: Directive 8020 Nolan Stafford
crew.description: Stafford is the first man on Mars and the commander of the Directive 8020 mission to Tau Ceti f. He helped build Corinth's space program and promised Bill Young that he would watch over Brianna.
relationships: Former mission partner of Bill Young

crew.name: Directive 8020 Laura Eisele
crew.description: Eisele is the lead designer of the mission and architect of the Cassiopeia. She is scientifically brilliant, highly disciplined, and connected to key systems including the ship's computer, The Oracle.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Josef Cernan
crew.description: Cernan is a perceptive technical engineer with a talent for solving mechanical and human problems. He is described as kind-hearted, open-minded, and a bonding presence within the crew.
relationships: Acts as emotional glue for the crew
Joined the Cetus Mission after a personal promise
Believes every problem has a solution

crew.name: Directive 8020 Samantha Cooper
crew.description: Dr. Cooper is a skilled medic with a military medical evacuation background. After surviving the Jessops Station tragedy, she rebuilt herself and joined the mission as both a doctor and a fighter.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Zoe Anders
crew.description: Anders joins the Cassiopeia crew late after the death of the previous Science Officer, George McNamara. She is excited by discovery but committed to ethical scientific practice.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Noah Mitchell
crew.description: Mitchell is the ambitious, wise-cracking co-pilot of the Cassiopeia. His risky flying style led to crashes in simulation, but also proved he could pull off maneuvers others could not.
relationships: Shares the pilot role aboard Cassiopeia

crew.name: Directive 8020 Tomas Carter
crew.description: Carter is a patient, responsible sleep technician who helps keep the Cassiopeia operational while the crew travels in hypersleep. His motivation is tied to securing a future for his daughter, Luna.
relationships: Part of the hypersleep operations team

crew.name: Directive 8020 Pari Simms
crew.description: Simms is a capable sleep technician chosen for her engineering skills and positive mindset. She records messages for her mother and works closely with Carter during the long journey to Tau Ceti f.
relationships: Supports her mother through mission logs
Part of the hypersleep operations team

crew.name: Directive 8020 LaMarcus Williams
crew.description: Williams is the billionaire CEO of Corinth and a divisive public figure who believes Earth is beyond saving. He backs Corinth's mission and places himself on the reconnaissance mission as a pioneer rather than a settler.
relationships: Connected to the mission's corporate backing
Inspired by the historic Mars mission involving Stafford and Bill Young

directive8020CoOpMultiplayer.title: Directive 8020 Co-Op Multiplayer: Movie Night, Local Play, and Online Update
directive8020CoOpMultiplayer.subtitle: Directive 8020 supports single-player and up to five-player local couch co-op at launch, with online multiplayer planned as a free post-launch update.
directive8020CoOpMultiplayer.intro: Directive 8020 keeps the cinematic solo experience but also brings back Movie Night, the local couch co-op mode built around shared decisions and passing one controller between players. The online version is planned to mirror the couch co-op experience after launch.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Full Story Solo
steps.description: Directive 8020 can be played as a single-player cinematic survival horror experience. You control key crew members, make life-or-death decisions, evade alien threats, and shape the branching story aboard the Cassiopeia.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Movie Night Couch Co-Op
steps.description: Movie Night mode lets up to five players experience Directive 8020 together locally. Each player can take control of a Cassiopeia crew member as the group decides who to trust and how to survive.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Shared Controller Play
steps.description: In local Movie Night, players share a single controller and pass it between crew members as the story unfolds. Every choice can affect who lives, who dies, and how the group reacts to the alien mimic threat.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Turning Points for Groups
steps.description: Directive 8020 introduces Turning Points, a visual branching story tree that lets players revisit pivotal decisions. In group sessions, this can turn character deaths and failed choices into debates about whether to continue or rewind.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Survival Mode Consequences
steps.description: For groups that want every decision to matter permanently, Survival Mode locks in consequences so choices are final. This is designed for players who want a no-takebacks Directive 8020 run.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Online Multiplayer Update
steps.description: Five-player online multiplayer is planned as a free post-launch update. It is designed to mirror the couch co-op Movie Night experience and bring the shared survival format online.

directive8020TurningPoints.title: How Turning Points Changes Your Directive 8020 Run
directive8020TurningPoints.subtitle: Turning Points is Directive 8020's rewind-focused story tree system for revisiting major decisions, unlocking hidden paths, and chasing multiple endings.
directive8020TurningPoints.intro: Directive 8020 adds a new Turning Points system built around key story branches. Instead of replaying the whole adventure from the beginning, players can use the story tree to return to pivotal moments, explore alternate routes, and try to save crew members from fatal outcomes.
directive8020TurningPoints.previewDescription: Use Turning Points to compare pivotal routes, replay major decisions, and plan a stricter Survivor Mode run.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Major Decision Point
steps.description: Turning Points is built around pivotal choices and story-changing moments aboard the Cassiopeia. These moments can shape who survives, what routes open, and how the story branches.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Story Tree Review
steps.description: The system presents branching possibilities through a story-tree style view, helping players understand where important alternatives exist and which moments can lead to different outcomes.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Choice Rewind
steps.description: Players can return to selected decision points and try another path. This is especially useful after a failed QTE, a fatal choice, or a route that locks a character into danger.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Hidden Paths
steps.description: Replaying branches can reveal alternate scenes, hidden routes, and character outcomes that may not appear in a first playthrough.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Multiple Endings
steps.description: Turning Points supports completion-focused players who want to replay the game, unlock different endings, and test how decisions ripple through the narrative.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Survivor Mode
steps.description: For players who want permanent consequences, Survivor Mode keeps the branching structure visible while removing the ability to use rewinds during the playthrough.

directive8020Platforms.title: Directive 8020 Platforms: PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X|S
directive8020Platforms.subtitle: Directive 8020 launches on PC via Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S on May 12, 2026.
directive8020Platforms.intro: Directive 8020 is a current-generation cinematic sci-fi horror game from Supermassive Games. The official platform lineup focuses on PC Steam, PS5, and Xbox Series X|S, with digital pre-orders available and physical console editions available through participating retailers.

platforms.name: Directive 8020 PC Steam
platforms.multiplayer: Single-player and local couch co-op at launch; online multiplayer planned as a free post-launch update
platforms.notes: Steam digital pre-orders include the Digital Deluxe Upgrade for a limited time.

platforms.name: Directive 8020 PlayStation 5
platforms.multiplayer: Offline play enabled; 1-5 players listed on PlayStation Store
platforms.notes: The PS5 listing includes DualSense vibration function and trigger effect support.

platforms.name: Directive 8020 Xbox Series X|S
platforms.multiplayer: Single player, Xbox local co-op 2-5, shared/split screen
platforms.notes: The Xbox listing shows Optimized for Xbox Series X|S, 4K Ultra HD, Xbox achievements, Xbox presence, and Xbox cloud saves.

platforms.name: Directive 8020 PS4 / Xbox One / Nintendo Switch
platforms.storefront: Not listed in the official launch platform lineup
platforms.notes: Official launch materials list PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC Steam as the supported platforms.

directive8020DigitalDeluxeEdition.title: What Comes in Directive 8020 Digital Deluxe Edition
directive8020DigitalDeluxeEdition.subtitle: The Digital Deluxe content adds Dark Pictures outfits, extra collectibles, cinematic filters, a digital artbook, and an exclusive soundtrack.
directive8020DigitalDeluxeEdition.intro: Directive 8020's Digital Deluxe Upgrade is positioned as a bonus package for players who want more cosmetic, collectible, and behind-the-scenes content. For a limited time, pre-orders include the Digital Deluxe Upgrade at no extra cost on supported storefronts.

benefits.title: Directive 8020 Digital Deluxe Upgrade
benefits.description: The upgrade includes The Dark Pictures Outfit Pack, Additional Dark Pictures Collectibles, Cinematic Filter Packs, Digital Artbook, and exclusive soundtrack.
benefits.availability: Included with pre-orders for a limited time on supported storefronts; the standalone upgrade requires the base game.

benefits.title: Directive 8020 The Dark Pictures Outfit Pack
benefits.description: Wear outfits inspired by previous Dark Pictures characters aboard the Cassiopeia, including Carter in Jason's army outfit from House of Ashes and Anders in Julia's diving-trip outfit from Man of Medan.
benefits.availability: Included in the Digital Deluxe Upgrade.

benefits.title: Directive 8020 Heirloom Retrieval Mission and Collectibles
benefits.description: Track down hidden dolls, relics, and figures connected to Man of Medan, Little Hope, House of Ashes, and The Devil in Me. These collectibles expand the link between Directive 8020 and the wider Dark Pictures universe.
benefits.availability: Included in the Digital Deluxe Upgrade.

benefits.title: Directive 8020 Cosmic Visual Filter Pack
benefits.description: Customize the game's cinematic look with three filters inspired by different eras of space missions: a classic black-and-white 60s filter, a gritty 70s 8mm-style film grain filter, and an 80s retro VHS filter.
benefits.availability: Included in the Digital Deluxe Upgrade.

benefits.title: Directive 8020 Digital Artbook
benefits.description: View concept art and behind-the-scenes material, including creative work related to Tau Ceti f, the Cassiopeia, and the game's body-horror transformations.
benefits.availability: Included in the Digital Deluxe Upgrade.

benefits.title: Directive 8020 Exclusive Soundtrack
benefits.description: Listen to the Directive 8020 soundtrack, with Xbox Store materials highlighting award-winning composer Jason Graves.
benefits.availability: Included in the Digital Deluxe Upgrade.

directive8020BeginnerGuide.title: Directive 8020 Beginner Guide: How to Survive the Cassiopeia
directive8020BeginnerGuide.subtitle: Start with the basics: manage choices carefully, stay alert during real-time alien threats, use stealth when possible, and coordinate decisions in Movie Night co-op.
directive8020BeginnerGuide.intro: Directive 8020 is a cinematic sci-fi survival horror adventure built around meaningful choices, branching outcomes, real-time threats, stealth, and social suspicion. This beginner guide focuses on the official mechanics and early gameplay structure players should understand before starting their first run.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Interactive Horror Film Mindset
steps.description: Directive 8020 blends cinematic storytelling with survival gameplay and a branching narrative. Watch character behavior closely, because dialogue choices and split-second reactions can change who lives and who dies.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Survival Choice Priority
steps.description: The game emphasizes meaningful choices where trust is fragile and every action can have consequences. When the crew is under pressure, think about both the immediate danger and the long-term effect on the group.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Trust No One Rule
steps.description: The alien organism can perfectly imitate its prey. Question suspicious behavior, avoid assuming every familiar face is safe, and remember that the crew's trust can break down when the enemy hides in plain sight.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Stealth First Approach
steps.description: Real-time alien threats roam the ship's corridors. The official gameplay description highlights improvised weapons, lightning reflexes, and stealth, so hiding, moving carefully, and choosing when to act are core survival habits.

steps.title: Directive 8020 QTE Readiness
steps.description: Directive 8020 keeps the pressure high with real-time danger and quick reactions. Failing a QTE can lead to serious consequences, making attention and timing important during tense scenes.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Lore and Collectibles
steps.description: The Cassiopeia includes secrets, Dark Pictures collectibles, and hidden content tied to the wider anthology. Careful exploration can reveal extra story context and bonus material.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Movie Night Group Decisions
steps.description: Movie Night mode lets up to five local players experience the story together, choose crew members to control, and work through life-or-death decisions as a group. Online multiplayer is planned as a free post-launch update.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Turning Points Replay Plan
steps.description: Turning Points lets players rewind selected story branches, uncover multiple endings, unlock hidden paths, and save crew members from fatal outcomes. For a stricter first run, Survivor Mode keeps consequences permanent.

directive8020ChoicesConsequences.title: Directive 8020 Choices and Consequences
directive8020ChoicesConsequences.intro: Directive 8020 choices can alter trust, relationships, scene routes, and survival outcomes. This section frames the story decisions players should watch closely during the Cassiopeia mission.

faqs.question: Do Directive 8020 choices affect character survival?
faqs.answer: Yes. Directive 8020 is built around branching decisions where timing, trust, and player responses can change who survives.

faqs.question: Why does trust matter in Directive 8020?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 uses a mimic organism to make trust dangerous, so the crew's relationships and suspicious behavior matter during major decisions.

faqs.question: Can Directive 8020 choices be revisited?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 Turning Points gives players a way to return to key decisions and explore alternate branches.

faqs.question: What makes Directive 8020 endings different?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 endings are shaped by route decisions, character survival, relationship outcomes, and how players handle alien threat moments.

directive8020DarkPicturesConnection.title: Directive 8020 The Dark Pictures Connection
directive8020DarkPicturesConnection.intro: Directive 8020 is the next cinematic horror entry in The Dark Pictures Anthology from Supermassive Games. It carries forward choice-driven storytelling while moving the series into deep-space sci-fi survival horror.

items.name: Directive 8020 Anthology Entry
items.description: Directive 8020 belongs to The Dark Pictures Anthology and extends the series into a new sci-fi chapter.

items.name: Directive 8020 Supermassive Style
items.description: Directive 8020 continues Supermassive Games' focus on interactive horror, cinematic scenes, and player-driven outcomes.

items.name: Directive 8020 Until Dawn Lineage
items.description: Directive 8020 appeals to players who enjoy character survival, group tension, and dramatic choices.

items.name: Directive 8020 Sci-Fi Shift
items.description: Directive 8020 changes the anthology texture by moving from earthly horror into a stranded deep-space mission.

directive8020AgeRating.title: Directive 8020 Age Rating
directive8020AgeRating.intro: Directive 8020 is positioned as mature cinematic survival horror with violence, blood, strong language, and tense alien threat scenes. Rating details help players and families understand the content profile before launch.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 ESRB M
ratings.description: Directive 8020 carries a mature content profile built around horror violence, blood, strong language, and intense scenes.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 PEGI 18
ratings.description: Directive 8020 European rating context aligns with adult horror themes, violence, and fear-driven storytelling.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 Horror Descriptors
ratings.description: Directive 8020 includes deep-space body horror, creature threat, crew tension, and cinematic danger.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 Audience
ratings.description: Directive 8020 is designed for players comfortable with mature survival horror, stressful choices, and intense scenes.
